completed_tasks.result: 5/5 named tests still fail (test-budget ceiling), 22 unexpected

remaining_tasks.name: Choose fix-path Option A (raise playwright.config.ts:51 timeout to 90000ms), B (reduce voterAnswerCount default 16→4), or C (voterContext optimization, new phase)
Re-run canonical capture after chosen fix-path lands

blockers.description: tests/playwright.config.ts:51 caps every test at timeout: 30000ms. voter.fixture.ts internal waitForURL bumps (Plan 64-04 Task 6) cannot exceed this ceiling. Under full-suite render contention (~102 tests, dev server under HMR pressure), the answer-loop consumes most of the 30s budget; the post-loop waitForURL runs out of room.
blockers.workaround: Option A: 1-line bump to 90000ms in playwright.config.ts:51 (recommended). Option B: reduce voter.fixture.ts:49 voterAnswerCount default 16→4 (changes test semantics). Option C: voterContext reactive-chain optimization (future phase scope).

human_actions_pending.action: Choose between fix-path Options A / B / C
human_actions_pending.context: See 64-03-RECAPTURE-NOTES.md for full analysis. Recommended: Option A.

decisions.rationale: User direction: 'Do D first, then A. With D also fix similar errors from these warnings'. 50+ warnings cleared across 5 categories; ElectionSelector init-time if-block converted to $effect (critical case empirically linked to voter-app cascade)

decisions.decision: Plan 64-04 fixture-internal timeout bumps (5s/10s/10s → 10s/30s/30s) were correct but insufficient — the ceiling is at the test wrapper level (playwright.config.ts:51), not inside the fixture
decisions.rationale: Empirical recapture verified; 4 of 5 named tests still timeout at fixture line 85 with 'Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded while setting up answeredVoterPage'

next_action: User decides Option A / B / C from 64-03-RECAPTURE-NOTES.md. Recommended: Option A — single-line bump of playwright.config.ts:51 from 30000 to 90000. Then resume Plan 64-03 Task 1 (third attempt) → Task 2 (constants regen, only if 5/5 named tests pass) → Task 3 (manual smoke checkpoint).
context_notes: All 5 named voter-results tests pass DETERMINISTICALLY in focused-grep runs (Plans 64-01/02 evidence + post-Plan-64-04 voter-results.spec.ts focused: 13/13 pass). The cascade is structural per-test timeout under full-suite render pressure, not spec-assertion incompatibility. ElectionSelector $effect conversion (Plan 64-04 Task 4) likely closed the auto-imply-single-election short-circuit issue but cannot be verified without re-running canonical capture after Option A lands. Pre-Plan-64-04 capture preserved at post-fix/playwright-report.pre-64-04.json for audit comparison.
